message:
test(extensions): expand params_hash_parity with HTTP object/non-object test vectors

Add http-object and http-non-object test cases to the HostcallRequest
params_hash_parity test, covering both structured {url, method, timeout}
payloads and bare string payloads. Renumber trace_ids sequentially (4→9)
to accommodate the new entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
